Off Calendar Jul-01-2025 Continued To Aug-05-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Discharging Bond
Off Calendar Nov-12-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jennifer Jaynes for Yung Sheng Chang Thiessan, administrator.

Ms. Jaynes informs the court that notices for all interested parties, including the guardian ad litem for the minor, had been filed as of November 6, 2024 and waivers were submitted. The court confirms that all notice requirements have been met. The court modifies the order to reduce the bond amount to $20,000.00 rather than discharging it, and signs the order in open court.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-07-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jennifer Jaynes appeared by zoom for and with Yung Sheng Chang Thiessen by zoom.
Rachel Rosenfeld appeared by zoom for and with Jenny Chang (petitioner for the appointment of a guardian ad litem) by zoom.

The court stated that it saw the waivers of bond that were filed. Mrs. Jaynes confirmed that the proposed administrator lives in Florida, stated that her intent is to request a minimum bond, that she has not had the opportunity to supplement or amend the petition and that the guardian ad litem signed a waiver of bond. Mrs. Jaynes also stated that there are no debts of the estate that she is aware of other than a $30,000.00 mortgage that is secured by the property and that they are not sure if it has been paid off or owed. The Petition for Letters of Administration is under submission with the court's intent to grant the petition and appoint Yung Sheng ("Sandy") Chang Thiessen as the administrator of the estate with full authority and bond set at $1,374,000.00. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee. A future date for closing of the estate will be set. The court explained that the ex parte petition for appointment of a guardian ad litem is processed as a drop off petition and that it will look into it.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Belen. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-25-2024 Continued To Aug-07-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
